'''laromo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khalifate|khalifate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-r-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khalifate|khalifate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| laromo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læremeth|læremeth]] || [[word:læremej|læremej]] || [[word:læremesh|læremesh]] || [[word:læreme|læreme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:laroromoth|laroromoth]] || [[word:laroromoj|laroromoj]] || [[word:laroromosh|laroromosh]] || [[word:laroromo|laroromo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:laromoth|laromoth]] || [[word:laromoj|laromoj]] || [[word:laromosh|laromosh]] || [[word:laromo|laromo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:larofmoth|larofmoth]] || [[word:larofmoj|larofmoj]] || [[word:larofmosh|larofmosh]] || [[word:larofmof|larofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:laromotho|laromotho]] || [[word:laromojo|laromojo]] || [[word:laromosho|laromosho]] || [[word:laromoko|laromoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:laromoth|laromoth]] || [[word:laromoj|laromoj]] || [[word:laromosh|laromosh]] || [[word:laromo|laromo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:laromothol|laromothol]] || [[word:laromojol|laromojol]] || [[word:laromoshol|laromoshol]] || [[word:laromokol|laromokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:laromothotho|laromothotho]] || [[word:laromojojo|laromojojo]] || [[word:laromoshosho|laromoshosho]] || [[word:laromoko|laromoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:laromothon|laromothon]] || [[word:laromojon|laromojon]] || [[word:laromoshon|laromoshon]] || [[word:laromokon|laromokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:laromothoro|laromothoro]] || [[word:laromojoro|laromojoro]] || [[word:laromoshoro|laromoshoro]] || [[word:laromokoro|laromokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
